products.title: Product Lineup
products.subtitle: Urethane adhesive and sealing solutions optimized for diverse industries

hs-100.name: HS-100 Urethane Adhesive
hs-100.description: High-strength structural urethane adhesive optimized for construction and industrial applications.

hs-200.name: HS-200 Waterproof Sealant
hs-200.description: Urethane sealant with excellent waterproofing performance, ideal for underground structures.

hs-300.name: HS-300 Waterproofing Agent
hs-300.description: Elastic urethane membrane waterproofing for roofs, floors, and various surfaces.

hs-400.name: HS-400 Urethane Grout
hs-400.description: High-pressure injection urethane grout for crack repair and ground reinforcement.

values.title: Core Values
values.subtitle: The corporate philosophy Hansung Urethane has upheld for 36 years

quality.title: Quality First
quality.description: Through strict quality management systems, we ensure all products meet the highest quality standards. We maintain customer trust by adhering to KS certification and international quality standards.

innovation.title: Technological Innovation
innovation.description: Through continuous R&D investment, we develop new urethane technologies and stay ahead of changing market demands. We secure competitiveness with patented technologies and proprietary manufacturing methods.

partnership.title: Customer Partnership
partnership.description: Beyond being a simple supplier, we provide optimal solutions as our customers' technology partners. We offer total service from pre-sales technical consulting to construction support.

about.title: About Us
about.subtitle: Growing as a urethane specialist company for 36 years since our founding in 1988
about.overview: Since its founding in 1988, Hansung Urethane has grown into a specialized manufacturer of urethane adhesives and sealants. From our own factory in Paju, Gyeonggi Province, we produce high-quality urethane products that comply with KS standards, supplying to hundreds of companies in the construction, civil engineering, and industrial sectors.
about.mission: We contribute to creating a safer and more sustainable construction environment through urethane technology innovation.
about.vision: To become Asia's leading specialist in urethane adhesive and sealing solutions.
certItems: KS F 4923 Urethane Rubber Waterproofing Certification
